title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise fixes critical authentication bypass in Aruba AOS-CX

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Hewlett Packard Enterprise fixes critical authentication byp
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/12
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '3.2.0.1'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 3.2.0.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Hewlett_Packard_Enterprise_fix"; sid:8739380; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 3.2.0.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX Hewlett_Packard_Enterprise_fix"; sid:2353240; rev:1;)
